name: Flagsmith
description: Open-source feature flag and remote config platform. Monitor organizations and feature states.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Flagsmith at https://app.flagsmith.com
2. Go to Organisation Settings → API Keys
3. Copy the Master API Key
4. Paste it below

Note: Server-side and Client-side keys won't work — you need the Master API Key.

credentialFields.label: Master API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Flagsmith → Organisation Settings → API Keys → Master API Key

checks.name: Flagsmith App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Flagsmith API is accessible.
